title: Say Goodbye to Knee Swelling with 11 Herbal Creams for Athletes
description: Urtica dioica creams, also known as nettle creams, have been used for centuries to help with knee swelling. The reason they work is due to the presence of certain properties and constituents, including flavonoids, carotenoids, and vitamin C. These compounds help reduce inflammation and ease pain by blocking the production of chemical messengers that cause swelling. The creams also contain uric acid, which is a natural diuretic that helps remove excess fluid from the body. If you're exp...
